themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 7 verses. Commentary leans on "Thomas Aquinas on Commentary on John: Then when he says, The Jewish Passover was near at hand...". Word-study detail reinforces "ἐγγὺς: at hand - near (literally or figuratively, of place or time)".
